subject: STT customs
body:
Jeffrey, 
While going thru customs this morning, Carol Montgomery said she sent you a book to NY office, and also would like to take you out to dinner, she said to call her if you like.
340 996 5995 cell
340 774 4420 work
Montgomerycarol@dhs.gov

Lv
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld
